description_long: This is a compact, modern desk lamp with a round, flat base and a slender, angular arm that supports a conical lampshade. The lamp's arm is bent at a right angle, giving it a functional, minimalist appearance suitable for workspaces or study areas. The lampshade is slightly flared and directs light downward, ideal for focused illumination. The entire lamp appears to be made of metal with a matte, dark blue finish, giving it a sleek and contemporary look. There are no visible decorative embellishments, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The lamp is small enough to fit comfortably on a desk or table without occupying much space.
description: A small, modern desk lamp with a matte dark blue finish, featuring a right-angled arm and a conical shade for focused lighting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the right-angled arm and the conical shade projecting forward from the round base.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular face of the lampshade and the slim vertical arm above the round base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the right-angled arm and conical shade from the other direction.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the conical shade and the straight vertical arm above the base.
